briefdescription.para: Map of parent particles by hash.
Map of child particles by hash.
Internal data structure holding particle properties.
Flag indicating if particle is being serialized.
Creates a clone of this particle.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the cloned particle.

briefdescription.para: The main selection method to override.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the event to evaluate.

simplesect.para: True if the event passes the selection, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the event to evaluate.

simplesect.para: True if the event passes, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the selection to merge from.

briefdescription.para: Creates a clone of this particle.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the cloned particle.

briefdescription.para: The main selection method to override.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the event to evaluate.

simplesect.para: True if the event passes the selection, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the event to evaluate.

simplesect.para: True if the event passes, false otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the selection to merge from.

briefdescription.para: Converts internal representation to Cartesian coordinates.
Converts internal representation to polar coordinates.
Checks if particle matches any of the given PDG IDs.

parameterdescription.para: Vector of PDG IDs to check against.

simplesect.para: True if particle's PDG ID matches any in the vector.

briefdescription.para: Calculates the angular separation ΔR from another particle.

simplesect.para: ΔR = √(Δη² + Δφ²)
True if particles have the same hash.

parameterdescription.para: The particle type (must inherit from particle_template).

simplesect.para: A new particle with combined four-momentum.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the particle to add.
Pointer to the particle to add.

simplesect.para: True if registration was successful.
True if registration was successful.

briefdescription.para: Adds a leaf (variable) to read for this particle.

parameterdescription.para: The internal name for this leaf.
The actual leaf name in the ROOT file (optional, defaults to key).

briefdescription.para: Applies the particle type as a prefix to leaf names.

memberdef.definition: std::map< std::string, std::map< std::string, particle_t > > particle_template::__reduce__
memberdef.name: __reduce__

simplesect.para: Nested map structure for serialization.

briefdescription.para: Builds the particle from event data.

parameterdescription.para: Map of particles in the event.

briefdescription.para: Splits a string into a vector of substrings based on a delimiter.

simplesect.para: A vector of substrings.

briefdescription.para: Removes whitespace from the beginning and end of a string.

simplesect.para: The trimmed string.

briefdescription.para: Gets the type name of a variable as a string (for debugging).

parameterdescription.para: The type to get the name of.

simplesect.para: The name of the type as a string.

inbodydescription.para: < Gets the type name via RTTI.
< Returns the type name.

briefdescription.para: Sums the elements of a vector.

parameterdescription.para: The type of elements in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to sum.

simplesect.para: The sum of all elements.

inbodydescription.para: < Initialize the output variable.
< Return the sum.

briefdescription.para: Bulk write operation for indices and hashes.
Writes a particle collection to output.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to vector of particles to write.
Name for this collection in output.

briefdescription.para: Template method to write a variable to output.

parameterdescription.para: The type of variable to write.
Name for this variable in output.

briefdescription.para: Template method to write a value to output.

parameterdescription.para: The type of value to write.
Name for this variable in output.

briefdescription.para: Switch board for dispatching particle attributes.
Switch board overload for integer data.
Switch board overload for double data.
Switch board overload for boolean data.
Reverses hash strings to their original weight maps.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to vector of hash strings.

simplesect.para: Vector of weight maps.

briefdescription.para: Compiles the event for this selection.

simplesect.para: True if compilation succeeded.

briefdescription.para: Builds the selection from an event.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the built selection.
True if selections are equal.

briefdescription.para: Sums particles into a combined particle.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to vector of particles to sum.

briefdescription.para: Sums particles from a map and returns the combined particle.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the summed particle.

briefdescription.para: Sums particles and returns the invariant mass in GeV.

simplesect.para: Invariant mass of the combined system in GeV.

briefdescription.para: Sums the elements of a vector.

parameterdescription.para: The type of elements in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to sum.

simplesect.para: The sum of all elements.

inbodydescription.para: < Initialize the output variable.
< Return the sum.

briefdescription.para: Safely deletes particles not marked for preservation.
Converts a map to a vector.

parameterdescription.para: The value type in the map.

simplesect.para: Vector of values from the map.

briefdescription.para: Removes duplicate particles based on hash.

simplesect.para: Vector with duplicates removed.

briefdescription.para: Downcasts particles to base particle_template type.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to input vector of derived particles.
Pointer to output vector of base particles.

briefdescription.para: Upcasts particles from a map to a derived type.
Upcasts particles from a vector to a derived type.
Extracts leptonic particles (leptons and neutrinos) from a map.
Checks if a particle is contained in a vector.

parameterdescription.para: The particle type in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to search.
Pointer to the particle to find.

simplesect.para: True if the particle is found.

briefdescription.para: Splits a string into a vector of substrings based on a delimiter.

simplesect.para: A vector of substrings.

briefdescription.para: Removes whitespace from the beginning and end of a string.

simplesect.para: The trimmed string.

briefdescription.para: Gets the type name of a variable as a string (for debugging).

parameterdescription.para: The type to get the name of.

simplesect.para: The name of the type as a string.

inbodydescription.para: < Gets the type name via RTTI.
< Returns the type name.

briefdescription.para: Creates a directory path, including parent directories if needed.
Deletes a directory path and its contents.
Checks if a path refers to an existing file.

simplesect.para: True if the path is a file and exists, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Converts a relative path to an absolute path.

simplesect.para: The absolute version of the path.

briefdescription.para: Lists files in a directory, optionally filtered by extension.

parameterdescription.para: File extension filter. If empty, all files are listed.

simplesect.para: A vector of filenames in the directory.

briefdescription.para: Converts a double value to a string with standard precision.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the value.

briefdescription.para: Converts a double value to a string with specified precision.

parameterdescription.para: The number of decimal places to consider.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the value.

briefdescription.para: Replaces all occurrences of a substring in a string.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to modify.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a string contains a specific substring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to check.

simplesect.para: True if the substring is found, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a string ends with a specific substring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to check.
The substring to check for at the end.

simplesect.para: True if the string ends with the substring, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a vector of strings contains a specific string.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the vector to search.

simplesect.para: True if the string is found in the vector, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Empties a vector and all objects it points to.

parameterdescription.para: The type of pointers in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to empty.

inbodydescription.para: < Loop through all elements in the vector.
< Delete the object the pointer points to.
< Set the pointer to nullptr to avoid dangling pointers.
< Clear the vector.

briefdescription.para: Fills a vector with pointers from another vector based on a selection index.

parameterdescription.para: The type of objects being pointed to.
Pointer to the output vector to fill.
Pointer to the source vector to select from.
Pointer to a vector of indices for selection.

inbodydescription.para: < Clear the output vector.
< Reserve space for the output elements.
< Loop through each selected index.
< Get the object at the selected index.
< Add it to the output vector.
< Mark the object as in use.

briefdescription.para: Extracts a specific property from a vector of objects into a new vector.

parameterdescription.para: The type of objects in the source vector.
The type of the property to extract.
Pointer to the output vector to fill with property values.
Pointer to the source vector of objects.
Function pointer to extract the property from an object.

inbodydescription.para: < Clear the properties vector.
< Reserve space for the property values.
< Loop through each object in the source vector.
< Create a default-initialized property variable.
< Call the provided function to extract the property.
< Add the property value to the output vector.

briefdescription.para: Creates a directory path, including parent directories if needed.
Deletes a directory path and its contents.
Checks if a path refers to an existing file.

simplesect.para: True if the path is a file and exists, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Converts a relative path to an absolute path.

simplesect.para: The absolute version of the path.

briefdescription.para: Lists files in a directory, optionally filtered by extension.

parameterdescription.para: File extension filter. If empty, all files are listed.

simplesect.para: A vector of filenames in the directory.

briefdescription.para: Converts a double value to a string with standard precision.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the value.

briefdescription.para: Converts a double value to a string with specified precision.

parameterdescription.para: The number of decimal places to consider.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the value.

briefdescription.para: Replaces all occurrences of a substring in a string.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to modify.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a string contains a specific substring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to check.

simplesect.para: True if the substring is found, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a string ends with a specific substring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to check.
The substring to check for at the end.

simplesect.para: True if the string ends with the substring, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a vector of strings contains a specific string.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the vector to search.

simplesect.para: True if the string is found in the vector, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Empties a vector and all objects it points to.

parameterdescription.para: The type of pointers in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to empty.

inbodydescription.para: < Loop through all elements in the vector.
< Delete the object the pointer points to.
< Set the pointer to nullptr to avoid dangling pointers.
< Clear the vector.

briefdescription.para: Fills a vector with pointers from another vector based on a selection index.

parameterdescription.para: The type of objects being pointed to.
Pointer to the output vector to fill.
Pointer to the source vector to select from.
Pointer to a vector of indices for selection.

inbodydescription.para: < Clear the output vector.
< Reserve space for the output elements.
< Loop through each selected index.
< Get the object at the selected index.
< Add it to the output vector.
< Mark the object as in use.

briefdescription.para: Extracts a specific property from a vector of objects into a new vector.

parameterdescription.para: The type of objects in the source vector.
The type of the property to extract.
Pointer to the output vector to fill with property values.
Pointer to the source vector of objects.
Function pointer to extract the property from an object.

inbodydescription.para: < Clear the properties vector.
< Reserve space for the property values.
< Loop through each object in the source vector.
< Create a default-initialized property variable.
< Call the provided function to extract the property.
< Add the property value to the output vector.
